commit.subject: LU-14824 tests: reduce sanity test_413 ZFS test time
commit.message:
LU-14824 tests: reduce sanity test_413 ZFS test time

Reduce the number of files and directories created by sanity
test_413 when running on ZFS, to avoid the test taking a long
time and occasionally timing out.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity env=ONLY=413,ONLY_REPEAT=30
Fixes: c1d0a355a6a ("LU-12624 lod: alloc dir stripes by QoS")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I64f6da5a4909df8b423af48e543f6b639cda29fa
